title: Suez Canal Blockage
description: Large container vessel grounding blocked Suez Canal for 13 days, causing major shipping delays for European-bound cargo from Asia.
mitigation_taken: Rerouted critical shipments via air freight; activated European buffer stock from Infineon Dresden.
lessons_learned: Maintain 5-day air-freight buffer budget for critical semiconductor components. Dual-source logistics providers for Asian routes.

title: South Korea Port Workers Strike
description: Port workers at Busan and Incheon ports went on strike for 12 days, delaying battery component shipments.
mitigation_taken: Pre-positioned safety stock covered 80% of gap. Negotiated SLA extension with VW for non-critical orders.
lessons_learned: Monitor labor relations calendar for key port regions. Build 7-day buffer before known negotiation periods.

title: Malaysia Semiconductor Fab Fire
description: Fire at Infineon Kulim facility damaged one clean room, reducing CAN controller output by 40% for 5 weeks.
mitigation_taken: Emergency sourcing from Infineon Dresden at premium pricing. Partial order deferral agreed with Bosch.
lessons_learned: Single-facility risk for CAN controllers is HIGH. Qualify STMicro as third source for CAN components. Insurance claim process took too long — streamline documentation.

title: EU Chip Act Compliance Audit
description: EU regulatory audit required documentation of semiconductor supply chain provenance. Slowed procurement approvals by 2 weeks.
mitigation_taken: Dedicated compliance team compiled documentation. Pre-approved suppliers expedited through new compliance portal.
lessons_learned: Maintain up-to-date supply chain provenance documentation. Build compliance templates for recurring audits.

title: Japan Earthquake — Noto Peninsula
description: 6.2 magnitude earthquake damaged logistics infrastructure in Ishikawa prefecture. Indirect delays to Korean shipping lanes.
mitigation_taken: Routed Samsung shipments through alternate Busan terminal. Minimal production impact due to healthy inventory.
lessons_learned: Geographic diversification of shipping routes is critical. Samsung alternate routing plan should be pre-negotiated.

title: Taiwan Strait Shipping Congestion
description: PLA naval exercises causing commercial shipping delays in Taiwan Strait. Port of Kaohsiung reporting 14-21 day delays. Affects TSMC semiconductor shipments. Estimated impact: 3 of your 6 Tier-1 supplier lanes affected.
